items.title: The next phase of enterprise AI | OpenAI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been highly active in April 2026 with a wave of announcements and model releases. On the product side, the company introduced enterprise-focused features including Codex pay-as-you-go pricing for business teams and a new $100/month Pro plan for high-intensity Codex sessions with GPT-5.4 access. Earlier in Q1 2026, OpenAI released three new GPT-5 family models: GPT-5.3 Instant (fast everyday tasks), GPT-5.4 Thinking (complex professional use), and GPT-5.4 Pro (most demanding workloads)

items.title: ChatGPT New Features in April 2026: GPT-5.4 Thinking, File Library, and More
items.author: imidef.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been on an aggressive model release cadence in early 2026, launching multiple GPT-5 variants across different capability tiers. The current lineup includes GPT-5.3 Instant (launched March 3, 2026 as the new default for all ChatGPT users with a 400K token context window), GPT-5.4 Thinking (designed for multi-step reasoning, long context, and tool-heavy workflows), and GPT-5.4 Pro (top-tier). items.title: OpenAI Research Index | OpenAI
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI's recent research publications in early 2026 span several key areas including AI safety, alignment, and scientific applications. Notable papers include work on chain-of-thought monitorability for detecting misalignment in internal coding agents, an exploration of instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs to improve safety steerability and resistance to prompt injection, and a January 2026 paper on 'AI as a Scientific Collaborator.' items.title: OpenAI Company Announcements
items.author: openai.com
items.snippet: OpenAI has been highly active on Twitter/X in early April 2026, announcing several major initiatives. On April 6, OpenAI announced the acquisition of TBPN and launched the OpenAI Safety Fellowship, a program supporting outside researchers focused on evaluation, ethics, robustness, privacy, and agent oversight.
